title: asperula cynanchica var. saxatilis
intro: Asperula cynanchica var. saxatilis, also known as the alpine woodruff, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is a low-growing, woody plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and has been used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. Asperula cynanchica var. saxatilis is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusate, and is sometimes used as a flavoring agent in traditional herbal remedies.
